## QA Checklist

- [ ] Start/Pause/Resume/Stop flow works
- [ ] Captures all clicks in main tab
- [ ] Captures linked popup tab clicks
- [ ] Previous SS modal works and closes
- [ ] Export Word works after long idle
- [ ] Watermark visible but readable
- [ ] Sensitive field redaction works
- [ ] Panel close stops recording
